creator: adridg@freebsd.org
text: I'm closing this as "overcome" because we're several fontconfig and firefox releases down the road. I think for this kind of issues we really need a "do exactly this to configure fonts" followed by screenshots with BIG RED ARROWS. Preferably the same situation in bug and non-bug situations, with BIG RED ARROWS pointing at the bug parts. In the "Firefox bugged" screenies in this PR I can't even find Firefox.
